subcodes.first_line: O sweetly singing nightingale! Thy letter was received, and from this sorrowful event profound grief was occasioned; yet patience [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بلبل خوش الحان نامه شما رسید از واقعه محزنه تاثر شدید حاصل گردیده لکن صبر
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
